dialog.title: Settings
dialog.description: Configure preferences and manage API keys

general.autoSaveDescription: Automatically save your project at regular intervals
general.defaultProvidersDescription: Choose which service to use by default for each feature
general.aggregatorDescription: Video/image generation, upscaling, and creative tools

security.setupMasterPasswordDescription: Set up a master password to encrypt and protect your stored API keys.
security.unlockDescription: Enter your master password to view and manage your API keys.
security.setMasterPasswordBody: Create a master password to encrypt your stored API keys.
security.unlockSettingsBody: Enter your master password to access your encrypted API keys.
security.changeMasterPasswordBody: Change your master password. All stored keys will be re-encrypted.
security.passwordGuidance: Your password is used to derive an encryption key via PBKDF2 (100k iterations). API keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM. If you forget this password, stored keys cannot be recovered.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.newPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
validation.operationFailed: Operation failed. Check your current password.

apiKeys.apiKeysEncrypted: Your API keys will be encrypted
apiKeys.manageApiKeys: You can now manage API keys
